steps.name: Bare Add opens metadata sheet instead of hardcoding Kitchen Cabinets
steps.criteria: When user types text and taps Add button, onOpenMetadataSheet is called with the input text instead of directly calling onAddItem with hardcoded Kitchen Cabinets; input text is cleared after opening sheet

steps.name: Remove dead code path for direct one-off add
steps.criteria: The hardcoded Kitchen Cabinets fallback in handleAdd is removed; if onOpenMetadataSheet is not provided, Add button is disabled or hidden; all tests pass
steps.scenario_name: add button requires metadata sheet handler

steps.name: Add QuickAdd bar to StoreView top
steps.criteria: StoreView renders QuickAdd component at the top; onSearch wired to staple library search; onSelectSuggestion adds staple to trip; onOpenMetadataSheet opens sheet for new items
steps.scenario_name: store view has quick add bar

steps.name: Store view metadata sheet defaults to store section context
steps.criteria: When opening metadata sheet from store view, default itemType is contextual (one-off for new items, staple for suggestions); store section field is prominent since user is already at the store
steps.scenario_name: store view metadata sheet uses store context
